title: microstegium ciliatum var. formosanum
intro: Microstegium ciliatum var. formosanum, also known as Japanese millet grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Microstegium ciliatum var. formosanum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and enhancing immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
